tools.name: wallet_check_balance
tools.description: Read the society's current USDC balance on Base and report whether it went UP since the last check (a 'deposit detected' signal -- e.g. the owner sent a manual top-up). Read-only, no side effects, alw

tools.sideEffect: IRREVERSIBLE: moves real money (USDC on Base)
